notes: The file proves the 'e=1 unramifiedness' of [ℓ] at both affine non-2-torsion and affine 2-torsion image points, providing two key exported theorems (ord_P_mulByInt_x_sub_const_eq_one and ord_P_mulByInt_y_sub_const_eq_one) that feed IsogenyOrdTransport. The char-2 branch of the 2-torsion case routes through DifferentialOrd.lean (ord_P_mulByInt_y_sub_const_le_one) for the upper bound, making that branch entirely sorry-free; the Wronskian-based separability argument (wronskian_Φ_ΨSq_general) is axiom-clean. No sorry appears anywhere in the file.
